questions.explanation: @font-face { font-family: 'Cambria Math'; src: url('https://appx-content-v2.classx.co.in/fonts/cambriamath.ttf') format('truetype');} *{overflow-wrap: break-word;} The correct answer is: b • Two sides and the included angle of one triangle are equal to two sides and the included angle of the other triangle. • This is the SAS rule, which is sufficient to prove congruence. • All three angles of one triangle are equal to all three angles of the other triangle. • This is not sufficient to prove congruence. Triangles with equal angles are similar, but their sides may not be equal (e.g., two triangles of different sizes can have the same angles). • Two sides of one triangle are equal to two sides of the other triangle. • This is not sufficient to prove congruence. The angles between the sides must also be equal for the triangles to be congruent. • One side and one angle of one triangle are equal to one side and one angle of the other triangle. • This is not sufficient to prove congruence. At least two sides and one angle (or two angles and one side) are required.

questions.question: @font-face { font-family: 'Nirmala UI'; src: url('https://appx-content-v2.classx.co.in/fonts/Nirmala.ttf') format('truetype');} *{overflow-wrap: break-word;} निम्नलिखित में से कौन सी 5 अंकों की सबसे बड़ी संख्या 47 से विभाज्य है?
questions.explanation: @font-face { font-family: 'Cambria Math'; src: url('https://appx-content-v2.classx.co.in/fonts/cambriamath.ttf') format('truetype');} *{overflow-wrap: break-word;} The correct answer is: d 99969 is the largest 5digit no. divisible by 47 99875 is also divisible but it is not the largest no.

questions.question: @font-face { font-family: 'Nirmala UI'; src: url('https://appx-content-v2.classx.co.in/fonts/Nirmala.ttf') format('truetype');} *{overflow-wrap: break-word;} तीन अम्लों A, B और C की सांद्रता क्रमशः 30%, 40% और 50% के रूप में निर्दिष्ट की गई है। उन्हें 3 : 5 : a के अनुपात में मिश्रित किया जाता है, जिससे 40% सांद्रता वाला घोल प्राप्त होता है। 'a' का मान क्या है?
questions.explanation: @font-face { font-family: 'Cambria Math'; src: url('https://appx-content-v2.classx.co.in/fonts/cambriamath.ttf') format('truetype');} *{overflow-wrap: break-word;} img, svg {vertical-align: middle; max-width:100%} The correct answer is: d

questions.question: @font-face { font-family: 'Cambria Math'; src: url('https://appx-content-v2.classx.co.in/fonts/cambriamath.ttf') format('truetype');} @font-face { font-family: 'Nirmala UI'; src: url('https://appx-content-v2.classx.co.in/fonts/Nirmala.ttf') format('truetype');} *{overflow-wrap: break-word;} C एक वृत्त है जिसका केंद्र O है और P एक बाहरी बिंदु है। PA और PB वृत्त C पर दो स्पर्श रेखाएँ हैं, जिनमें A और B स्पर्श बिंदु हैं। यदि PA और PB एक-दूसरे पर 59° के कोण पर झुकी हुई हैं, तो ∠POA का मान ज्ञात कीजिए।
questions.explanation: @font-face { font-family: 'Cambria Math'; src: url('https://appx-content-v2.classx.co.in/fonts/cambriamath.ttf') format('truetype');} *{overflow-wrap: break-word;} img, svg {vertical-align: middle; max-width:100%} The correct answer is: b
